1.content:
You are lying on the ground trying to recall what happened, you remember your parents saying that whilst they were gone, dee dee was in charge and you replied by saying that you’d be in your lab most of the time and that as long as dee dee didn’t bother you for any unnecessary reasons and not touch anything in your lab, everything would be ok, you then walked back into your lab, saw that your highly experimental transformation ray was malfunctioning, as you rush over to try and fix it you see a flash of white light, pass out and fall to the ground.

You wake up on the ground, you can see your reflection and when you see that you’re the size of one of dee dee’s baby dolls you pass out again as you hear footsteps approaching

You wake up
1.title: The transformation begins

12.content:
As you slowly open your eyes you see your reflection once again and see that you’re wearing a baby blue onesie with matching red booties and mittens, a baby blue bonnet and a red bib with “entrance” written on it below an arrow pointing at your mouth, as you slowly sit up you see what’s on the back of the onesie, a butt flap that reads “emergency exit”.

You hear the door open and lay back down, suddenly dee dee walks in and says “did baby enjoy his nap, now it’s playtime, as she tries to grab you you move away, when she finally grabs you she says “now you listen here and you listen good, i took some very embarrassing pictures of you and if you don’t, I’ll spread the photos throughout the entire school, understand” you nod as she says “now stop being a stinker” she suddenly smells the air and says “eww, speaking of stinky, time to change your diaper” she lays you down on the changing table and proceeds to change your diaper, she picks you up and says “ok my clean little man, now we’re going to play
12.title: In A crib

info.brief_description: When their parents go on a cruise, dexter gets shrunken down to the size of a baby doll
info.description:
Rules:

No sex

No death

Story is told from dexter’s POV

Note: in this story, like his sister, dee dee is super smart and a genius inventor, she also loves playing with baby dolls

As long as the rules are followed, all additions are welcome
